title: [SV] Split sv.ifdef into two different operations
body:
It came up in a discussion yesterday that sv.ifdef should be split into the different nodes, one that is a `ProceduralRegion` that can be used in an always block, and one that is a graph region that can be used in a top level of an rtl.module.

This will allow us to build better assertions, e.g. check that a fwrite only occurs in `ProceduralRegion`'s
